per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Best supportive care';

per_item.question: Which Ipilimumab trials in Hodgkin Lymphoma used Chemo/Anti-EGFR as the control (using only one filter condition)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';

per_item.question: Which Colorectal studies tested ICI+Chemo+Anti-VEGF combinations, and what were the primary endpoints (return fewer columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+MEKi';

per_item.question: List Prostate trials requiring a biomarker other than PD‑L1 for inclusion. (with a different Cancer type value (Melanoma))?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Cancer type", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';

per_item.question: Show Esophageal/GEJ trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (with fewer filtering conditions)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ';

per_item.question: Show Esophageal/GEJ trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (without condition "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ')?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Lines of treatment" >= 2 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

per_item.question: Show Esophageal/GEJ trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (using only one filter condition)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

per_item.question: Find Small Cell Lung trials of Tremelimumab given in combination therapy. (without condition "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination')?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';

per_item.question: Find Small Cell Lung trials of Tremelimumab given in combination therapy. (return only two key columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

per_item.question: Which Multiple Myeloma trials specified neoadjuvant ICI use (without condition "Clinical setting in relation to surgery" = 'Clinical setting in relation to surgery')?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Trial phase", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma';

per_item.question: Which Multiple Myeloma trials specified neoadjuvant ICI use (return only two key columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND "Clinical setting in relation to surgery" = 'Clinical setting in relation to surgery';

per_item.question: Which Non-Small Cell Lung trials had at least 4 arms and used Chemoradio as control (with fewer filtering conditions)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';

per_item.question: Which Non-Small Cell Lung trials had at least 4 arms and used Chemoradio as control (return only two key columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Number of arms" >= 4 AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Which Mesothelioma phase 3 trials compared ICI to BRAFi+MEKi (return fewer columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Which Mesothelioma phase 3 trials compared ICI to BRAFi+MEKi (return fewer columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Which Mesothelioma phase 3 trials compared ICI to BRAFi+MEKi (return only two key columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Which Mesothelioma phase 3 trials compared ICI to BRAFi+MEKi (return only two key columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Show Renal cell trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (return fewer columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 2 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

per_item.question: Show Renal cell trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (using only one filter condition)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell';

per_item.question: Show Renal cell trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (with a relaxed numeric threshold on Lines of treatment)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 1 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

per_item.question: List Bladder trials requiring a biomarker other than PD‑L1 for inclusion. (using only one filter condition)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Cancer type", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';
